source: # STASY HTML timetable pages publish station names with assorted spellings.
# Each row pins one operator label to our internal stations.id. Edit this
# file to fix newly discovered drift; the resolver picks the canonical id
# at ingest time so the on-device data never sees the raw spelling.
# For interchanges where multiple ids exist for the same passenger station
# master document's rule: metro wins over tram and over suburban.

notes: Metro wins at the M3 / T7 interchange
Metro wins at the M3 / A1 / A2 interchange
Metro wins at the M2 / T7 interchange
Metro wins at the M1 / A1 / A2 interchange
Metro wins at the M1 / A1 / A2 interchange
Metro wins at the M3 / A1 / A2 interchange
Metro wins at the M3 / A1 / A2 interchange
